description: Create an interactive troubleshooting decision tree tiddler titled 'Troubleshooting: Internet Connectivity' tagged with 'Troubleshooting' and 'NetworkSupport'. Use <$reveal> and <$button> widgets and the state tiddler '$:/state/troubleshoot-internet' to manage the flowchart state. The guide must begin by asking 'Can the user access any websites?' with Yes/No options. If 'No', branch to a gateway ping check: if the gateway is unreachable, advise physical/cable checks; if reachable, check ping to 8.8.8.8 to distinguish between DNS resolution (success) and routing/firewall (failure) issues. If 'Yes' (Partial internet), branch to distinguish between slow speeds (advise speed test) and specific site issues (advise proxy/firewall check). Every resolution step must include a 'Start Over' button that resets the state tiddler to the beginning.
